creator: kiri@kiri.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've made a NEW port about Mew(Message interface of Emacs
	Window) with both Emacs and Mule. This is the master port of
	mew-mule-1.92(mail/mew-mule), mew-1.92(mail/mew) and the slave
	of im-76(mail/im). 
        I put the port packed with 'tar czf' and uuencode below "Fix:"

	Packed list is
